title: quercus × campitica
intro: Quercus × campitica, also known as the hybrid of Quercus robur and Quercus petraea, is a deciduous tree species native to Europe. The medicinal properties of Quercus × campitica are attributed to its bark, which contains tannins and flavonoids, providing antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Quercus × campitica include its ability to support cardiovascular health, improve cognitive function, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Quercus × campitica can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and extracts, often used to support immune function and reduce inflammation.
